Title: Sage Green Pocket Tee with Cityscape Print - Unisex Casual Shirt
Description:
Elevate your everyday wardrobe with this perfectly tailored, light sage green pocket tee. Designed for effortless style, this t-shirt combines a classic, comfortable fit with a modern, subtle graphic pocket print, making it an essential piece for any casual collection.

  • Effortless Comfort: Crafted from a soft, breathable fabric that feels great whether you're spending a long day out or relaxing at home.
  • Stylish Detail: The pocket features a unique, moody cityscape graphic, adding a cool, urban flair without overpowering the clean lines of the basic fit.
  • Universal Fit: This unisex design drapes comfortably on all body types, ensuring a flattering and relaxed silhouette.

Whether paired with distressed denim for a weekend outing, layered under a bomber jacket for a cool evening, or simply worn as a standout basic, this shirt offers versatile style year-round. It also makes a thoughtful and stylish gift for friends or family who appreciate minimalist yet detailed apparel.
